textPlain: I wonder if this is still a problem if nftables was used instead.nftables has been in mainline linux since 3.13 over a decade ago, and has been in the default in distros for a while (Debian 10 had it as default 6 years ago), but K8s support for it has lagged far behind, with it just recently out of beta in 1.33, and still not the default.
